positive: A minimalist geometric pattern featuring stylized flora and celestial bodies. The design consists of interconnected abstract line art drawings forming delicate mountain ranges, crescent moons, and abstract blooming lotus flowers. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blue, muted teal, burnt orange, and ivory white. The style should be clean, elegant, and inspired by Art Deco meets Zen aesthetics. High contrast, perfect symmetry, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Center composition, vector illustration quality, crisp lines, seamless repeating pattern structure, isolated on a white background.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, words, low resolution, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, smudged, artifact, copyright, character
